findings.title: SQL injection in user lookup
findings.runtime_scope_justification: src/auth/lookup.py serves the public authentication API.
findings.failure_mode_justification: Raw string interpolation allows arbitrary SQL execution.
findings.evidence_quality_justification: Code path from request handler through lookup to raw SQL visible at lines 10-23.
findings.trace_origin_justification: Traced from auth endpoint handler at routes.py:5 through lookup() at lookup.py:23.
findings.effort_to_fix_justification: Use parameterized queries via the existing db.execute_params() helper.
findings.why_it_matters: Allows arbitrary query execution by any authenticated user.
findings.suggested_fix: Use parameterized queries via the existing db.execute_params() helper.

findings.title: Missing null check before deref
findings.runtime_scope_justification: src/auth/service.py is internal service code not directly exposed to untrusted input.
findings.failure_mode_justification: Null dereference causes unhandled AttributeError and process crash.
findings.evidence_quality_justification: session variable can be None when user is logged out; line 108 accesses .user_id without check.
findings.trace_origin_justification: Traced within auth module: session from get_session() can return None, accessed at service.py:108.
findings.effort_to_fix_justification: Add an early return when session is None.
findings.suggested_fix: Add an early return when session is None.

findings.title: README missing install instructions
findings.failure_mode_justification: Missing install section misleads new contributors about setup.
findings.evidence_quality_justification: README.md has no Install section; verified by reading the file.
findings.trace_origin_justification: Observed at README.md:1; no code trace applicable for documentation.
findings.effort_to_fix_justification: Add an Install section with the standard pip-install incantation.
findings.suggested_fix: Add an Install section with the standard pip-install incantation.

findings.title: Maybe we should log here
findings.failure_mode_justification: No specific failure scenario; stylistic suggestion about logging.
findings.evidence_quality_justification: No concrete evidence of debugging difficulty; general best practice.
findings.trace_origin_justification: Observed at service.py:55; no caller trace performed.
findings.issue: No log statement at this branch point.
